scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -e . && .venv/bin/calis-api-seed && .venv/bin/uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001
scripts.generate:api-types: mkdir -p .cache && bun run generate:api-schema > .cache/calis-openapi.json && openapi-typescript .cache/calis-openapi.json -o apps/mobile/src/lib/api-schema.ts
